title: hahnia
intro: Hahnia, also known as Hahnia glabra, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is commonly found in the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. The leaves of the hahnia plant are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Hahnia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
